title: Elemental Weapons
description: Elemental weapons and necklaces for the 4 elements
body:
## Elemental Weapons
This mod adds a weapon for each element. _The description will always match the **latest** version of the mod_

- You can view the recipes using [JEI]([https://modrinth.com/mod/jei/version/15.0.0.12](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei/version/15.0.0.12))
- Compatible with [Better Combat]([https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat))

### Features:
**Swords:**
- Air Sword
- Fire Sword
- Water Sword
- Earth Sword

**Items:**
- Air Crystal
- Fire Crystal
- Water Crystal
- Earth Crystal

**Trinkets:**
- Air Necklace
- Fire Necklace
- Water Necklace
- Earth Necklace

<details>
<summary>Abilities</summary>
  
- Air Sword: Dash ability
- Fire Sword: Fireball ability
- Water Sword: Sends a geyser below nearby entities
- Earth Sword: Sends a circle of dirt that knocks nearby entities

</details>
